title: Hypixel Skyblock Simple
body:
![Skyblock Banner - by u/RealHyperinon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf6416bd00066b5f264fc272be1186fe7858615b_0.webp)

# Simple Skyblock
The All-in-One Skyblock Modpack for **you**!

> **Simple Skyblock [1.21]** is a All-in-One Modpack for Hypixel Skyblock!
> It includes essential mods to enhance your Hypixel Skyblock gameplay. Enjoy an easy, one-click installation for improved performance and helpful on-screen quality-of-life features.

> **_📢 Allocate Sufficient RAM: Assign at least 5GB of RAM to Minecraft for smooth gameplay. 2GB will lead to stuttering and lag._**

> The pack includes SkyHanni, Firmament, Skyblocker, Sodium, SBA and more!
> -> More QOL of Life Mods than probably any other Hypixel Skyblock Modpack!

**⚙️ Config Management**
> A lot of Mods are preconfigured! With the help of **Mod Menu** you can access every config in-game!


> There are also 3 images showing what your game could look like. The package also contains several resource packs so that each game can look different. Everything is 100% customizable via the mod menu. **But best of all: try it out for yourself!**
